analysis_boundary: Post-pilot analysis evaluates submitted evidence only. It does not define truth, certify production readiness, or convert pilot completion into public launch authority.
authority_boundary: Stakeholder evidence reports communicate validated evidence status only. They do not define truth, certify compliance, authorize launch, or replace replay and CI validators.

evidence_status.rule: no success language is allowed until post-pilot analysis accepts evidence

executive_boundary.allowed_pass_claim: AfriRide pilot evidence is accepted as bounded evidence that the sealed proof stack remained reproducible during the analyzed pilot window.
executive_boundary.must_include: Stakeholder evidence reports communicate validated evidence status only. They do not define truth, certify compliance, authorize launch, or replace replay and CI validators.

reproduction_instructions.rule: stakeholder readers must be able to reproduce validator status locally

required_next_evidence.if_accepted: state only bounded evidence acceptance, not readiness expansion
required_next_evidence.if_deferred: list missing trace, dashboard, or replay artifacts
required_next_evidence.if_rejected: list invariant that failed and preserve failure evidence
